title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAYAN-BAYANAN AVE. TRAVERSING BARANGAY CONCEPCION UNO AND BARANGAY MARIKINA HEIGHTS IN THE SECOND DISTRICT, CITY OF MARIKINA INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3488; 109 OG No. 22, 3872 (June 3, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10404, March 19, 2013 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAYAN-BAYANAN AVE. TRAVERSING BARANGAY CONCEPCION UNO AND BARANGAY MARIKINA HEIGHTS IN THE SECOND DISTRICT, CITY OF MARIKINA INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Bayan-Bayanan Ave. traversing Barangay Concepcion Uno and Barangay Marikina Heights in the Second District, City of Marikina is hereby converted into a national road.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Public Works and Highways shall include in the Departmentâs program the improvement, maintenance and repair of the said road, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 3, 2011 and December 19, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved, MAR 19 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
